target_paper.title: The complete conformational free energy landscape of beta-xylose reveals a two-fold catalytic itinerary for beta-xylanases

checks.name: deltaF_C7ax_C7eq
checks.source: fes_phi.dat (1D phi projection, Boltzmann-integrated over psi)

modules.name: xylose-puckering-fel

checks.name: chair_basins_found
checks.note: Chair A at theta=10deg (16.1 kJ/mol), Chair B at theta=172deg (0.0 kJ/mol, global min)

modules.structure_source: PDB 2D24 crystal (XYS C res 4), crystallographically verified
modules.errata: Global min at theta=172deg. Per PLUMED convention (C1-C2-C3-C4-C5-O5): theta=0 is 4C1, theta=pi is 1C4. Convention question open for Alistaire.

modules.name: enzyme-bound-puckering

checks.name: system_setup
checks.note: PDB 2D24 chain A + -1 subsite xylose (XYS C res 4), CHARMM36, 92745 atoms

checks.name: puckering_fel_topology
checks.note: Three basins: Chair A (13.6 kJ/mol), Boat (5.4 kJ/mol), Chair B (0.0 kJ/mol global min)

checks.name: free_vs_bound_comparison
checks.note: Enzyme lowers all barriers: A→Boat by 5.1, Boat→B by 0.9, Chair A by 2.5, Boat by 1.0 kJ/mol

modules.system: GH10 xylanase chain A (427 residues) + -1 subsite BXYL + 28758 TIP3P + 88 NA + 86 CL

key_result.description: Enzyme active site uniformly lowers conformational barriers for -1 subsite xylose
key_result.interpretation: Consistent with catalytic facilitation of ring distortion during glycoside hydrolysis

issues: Module 2 xylose_charmm.pdb was beta-D-Lyxose (RDKit SMILES error) → rebuilt from PDB 2D24 crystal
Module 3 marked IN_FLIGHT but production had completed → ran sum_hills
No atom index documentation → added ATOM_INDEX_MAP.md

evolution.acceptance_test: Free vs enzyme-bound puckering FEL reproduces conformational selection — DONE
